name: Mom's Congealed Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cottage cheese, mayo and jello/water in a blender until the cheese is liquefied.
2. Add some ice cream to make it sweeter; it should taste sweeter than the end product.
3. Add nuts at the last minute and stir on low speed.
4. Stir in fruit and set in refrigerator.
Notes:
1 package of jello gels 2 cups of liquid.
Use lemon jello if substituting vegetables for fruit.
